translations.en: What a discovery today at the museum.
translations.es: Hoy hicimos un gran descubrimiento en el museo.
translations.de: Heute haben wir im Museum eine großartige Entdeckung gemacht.
translations.it: Oggi abbiamo fatto una grande scoperta al museo.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天我们在博物馆有了重大发现。
translations.yue: 今日我哋喺博物館有個好大嘅發現。
translations.ru: Сегодня мы сделали большое открытие в музее.
translations.pt: Hoje fizemos uma grande descoberta no museu.
translations.tr: Bugün müzede büyük bir keşif yaptık.
translations.vi: Hôm nay chúng tôi đã có một khám phá lớn ở bảo tàng.
translations.ar: اليوم قمنا باكتشاف كبير في المتحف.
translations.nl: Vandaag hebben we in het museum een grote ontdekking gedaan.
translations.uk: Сьогодні ми зробили велике відкриття в музеї.
translations.hu: Ma nagy felfedezést tettünk a múzeumban.
translations.hi: आज हमने संग्रहालय में एक बड़ी खोज की.
translations.pl: Dziś dokonaliśmy wielkiego odkrycia w muzeum.
translations.el: Σήμερα κάναμε μια σπουδαία ανακάλυψη στο μουσείο.
translations.nb: I dag gjorde vi en stor oppdagelse på museet.
translations.id: Hari ini kami membuat penemuan besar di museum.
translations.sv: I dag gjorde vi en stor upptäckt på museet.
translations.ro: Astăzi am făcut o mare descoperire la muzeu.
translations.cs: Dnes jsme v muzeu udělali velký objev.
translations.da: I dag gjorde vi en stor opdagelse på museet.
translations.ja: 今日は博物館で大きな発見をしました。

tokens.explanation: Exclamative/interrogative determiner agreeing with the feminine noun 'découverte'; introduces the NP.
Feminine singular common noun; head of the NP.
Temporal adverb; specifies the time reference of the utterance.
Preposition 'à' fused with the definite article 'le' (contraction 'à+le' → 'au'); introduces the PP.
Masculine singular noun; object of the preposition 'au' indicating location.

sentences.target: On fait une découverte en forêt.

translations.fr: On fait une découverte en forêt.
translations.en: We're making a discovery in the forest.
translations.es: Estamos haciendo un descubrimiento en el bosque.
translations.de: Wir machen im Wald eine Entdeckung.
translations.it: Stiamo facendo una scoperta nel bosco.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在森林里有了新发现。
translations.yue: 我哋喺森林入面有新發現。
translations.pt: Estamos fazendo uma descoberta na floresta.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang phát hiện ra một điều trong rừng.
translations.nl: We doen een ontdekking in het bos.
translations.hi: हम जंगल में एक खोज कर रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi gjør en oppdagelse i skogen.
translations.id: Kami sedang melakukan penemuan di hutan.
translations.sv: Vi gör en upptäckt i skogen.
translations.da: Vi gør en opdagelse i skoven.
translations.ja: 森で新しい発見をしています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/personal subject pronoun; here used as 'we/one'; 3rd person singular subject of the verb.
Finite verb (present 3sg) agreeing with 'On'; main predicate taking a direct object.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; marks indefiniteness of 'découverte'.
Feminine singular noun; direct object of 'fait'.
Preposition indicating location; heads the PP 'en forêt'.
Feminine singular noun; object of the preposition 'en'.

translations.en: Your discovery interests the whole team.
translations.es: A todo el equipo le interesa tu descubrimiento.
translations.de: Deine Entdeckung interessiert das ganze Team.
translations.it: La tua scoperta interessa tutta la squadra.
translations.ko: 팀 전체가 네 발견에 관심이 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 你的发现让整个团队都很感兴趣。
translations.yue: 你嘅發現引起咗成個團隊嘅興趣。
translations.pt: A sua descoberta interessa a toda a equipe.
translations.he: התגלית שלך מעניינת את כל הצוות.
translations.vi: Khám phá của bạn thu hút sự quan tâm của cả đội.
translations.nl: Jouw ontdekking interesseert het hele team.
translations.hu: A felfedezésed az egész csapatot érdekli.
translations.hi: तुम्हारी खोज में पूरी टीम की रुचि है.
translations.el: Η ανακάλυψή σου ενδιαφέρει όλη την ομάδα.
translations.ja: あなたの発見はチーム全体の興味を引いています。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular possessive determiner; feminine singular; modifies 'découverte'.
Feminine singular noun; subject of 'intéresse'.
Finite verb (present 3sg) agreeing with the subject; takes a direct object 'toute l'équipe'.
Quantifier determiner, feminine singular; modifies 'l'équipe' meaning 'the whole team'.
Common noun with elided definite article 'l'' attached; direct object of 'intéresse'.

translations.en: I call that a small discovery.
translations.de: Ich nenne das eine kleine Entdeckung.
translations.zh-Hans: 我把这称为一个小发现。
translations.yue: 我叫呢樣做一個小發現。
translations.pt: Eu chamo isso de uma pequena descoberta.
translations.tr: Ben buna küçük bir keşif diyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi gọi đó là một khám phá nhỏ.
translations.nl: Ik noem dat een kleine ontdekking.
translations.hu: Én ezt egy kis felfedezésnek hívom.
translations.hi: मैं इसे एक छोटी खोज कहता हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg kaller det en liten oppdagelse.
translations.sv: Jag kallar det en liten upptäckt.
translations.ro: Eu numesc asta o mică descoperire.
translations.da: Jeg kalder det en lille opdagelse.
translations.ja: それを小さな発見と呼びます。

tokens.explanation: Finite verb (present 1sg) with attached clitic subject 'j'' (elided 'je'); main predicate taking DO 'ça' and an object complement NP.
Demonstrative pronoun; direct object of 'J'appelle'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; introduces the object-complement NP.
Adjective, feminine singular; modifies 'découverte'.
Feminine singular noun; head of the NP functioning as an object complement naming what 'ça' is called.

jp: On fait une découverte en forêt.

en: What a discovery today at the museum.
We're making a discovery in the forest.
Your discovery interests the whole team.
I call that a small discovery.
